title: EVO Inline Kids Foldable Adjustable 2 Wheeled Push Scooter for Boys and Girls, Color- Pink
features: Excellent for fun outdoor adventures; Made with active kids in mind; Two 125mm wheels for confident rides
ABEC 5 bearings proving smooth action; Rear brake for safety during leisurely rides; EVA handle grips ensuring a comfortable and secure hold
Folds flat for easy storage and transportation; Great gift for little thrill-seekers; Adjustable Handle Height: 67cm - 77cm (26.2” - 33.3”)
Product Weight: 2kg (4.4lbs); Construction: Steel and alloy frame
description: Product Description Introducing EVO Inline Scooter Get ready to elevate your child's playtime with the EVO Children's Inline Scooter – the ultimate ride that blends style, speed, and pure exhilaration! Unleash the spirit of adventure as your little one cruises through the neighbourhood on a scooter designed for endless fun. Hours of Outdoor Adventure! Encouraging Growth & Development This scooter will help improves your childrens balance, co-ordination and most important their self-confidence. The EVO Inline is lightweight and foldable, making it a breeze to carry and store. Convenience for you and endless fun for them! Vibrant Colourway Designs The vibrant colourway design is cool and colourful, perfect for boys and girls. With a sleek and modern design, this scooter stands out with its eye-catching aesthetics. Engineered for young thrill-seekers, the EVO Inline Scooter is both lightweight and highly manoeuvrable. What is the handle height? Adjustable Handle Height: 67cm - 77cm. Does this scooter fold flat? Yes, this scooter folds flat for easy storage & transportation. What are the product dimensions? Product Dimensions: H77cm x W32cm x D67cm. What is the maximum weight? Maximum Weight: 50kg. What age is the product suitable for? Suitable for all children aged 5+. Perfect for kids who love to be outside! Easy Fold For Handy Storage You can store it almost anywhere whether at Home, School or on the go. This scooter has a simple fold and lock mechanism allowing easy storage, even fitting it under a pram. The Perfect Gift For Any Occasion! Whether for Birthdays, Christmas or even just a special treat, allow your child to develop their motor skills with this scooter as they increase their coordination, endurance and strength. This is ideal for getting your child off their tablets and getting them outside. EVO Range A Scooter Designed Just For You! With a wide range and incredible value, there is something for everyone. Offering everything from all things kids scooters to Skateboards, themed ride ons including, Police Cars, Unicorn Cars and Fire Trucks. Product Specifications Includes 1x EVO 2 Wheeled Scooter. Adjustable Handle Height: 67cm - 77cm. Maximum Weight: 50KG. ABEC-5 Bearings. Easy Fold Mechanism. Dimensions - H67-77cm x W32cm x D67cm. Suitable for children 5+
